name: MyCockpit Design Constitution
vibe: Minimal, calm, premium ambient lab dashboard. iOS 26 aesthetic. Content-first. Every element serves a purpose.

hierarchy.description: Strong visual hierarchy. One focal point per screen. Reserve large cards for truly important content. Use grouped list rows for most content.

glass_usage.description: Liquid Glass only in navigation chrome: top bar, tab bar, floating controls, overlays, chips, sidebars. Never on content cards.

typography.description: SF Pro hierarchy. Large Title 34px bold, Title 22px bold, Headline 17px semibold, Body 17px regular, Subhead 15px, Caption 11-12px. Fewer sizes used consistently.
violations: All-caps for anything other than section labels
More than 2-3 accent colors visible simultaneously
Low contrast text on dark backgrounds
Decorative color that adds visual noise

spacing.description: 4/8pt grid. Outer margin 16px mobile, 24px desktop. Section spacing 32px. Row padding 11px vertical, 16px horizontal.
violations: Too much padding on dense content views
Decorative divider lines in page chrome

responsiveness.description: Mobile-first. Primary actions in thumb reach (bottom half). Touch targets minimum 44pt height.
violations: Desktop layout not adapting to mobile

accessibility.description: Small text minimum 4.5:1 contrast. Status uses shape + icon + label, not color alone.
violations: Muted gray text on dark background with insufficient contrast
No aria labels on icon-only buttons

interactions.description: Every visible control must have clear purpose. No dead buttons. Subtle motion only. Clear affordances.

layout.description: Content edge-to-edge. Nav chrome floats above. Grouped list rows over heavy cards. Inset sections.
violations: Heavy opaque rounded rectangles for every container
Borders on content containers (use background contrast)

visual_clarity.description: Clear hierarchy, one focal point, no clutter

interaction_clarity.description: Clear CTAs, no dead controls, good affordances
